trivia_bullets.text: Courier Griffin is a common from Battle for Zendikar (BFZ, released October 2, 2015), the first set of the Eldrazi-invasion two-set block. BFZ depicts the return of Ulamog the Ceaseless Hunger to Zendikar; griffins serve as the Zendikari resistance's primary long-distance messenger animals between isolated settlements.

"Sea Gate has fallen. Survivors are on the move. Will send another griffin when we find refuge. Stay hidden. Stay safe." — Message from Tars Olan, kor world-gift. Sea Gate is the canonical most-organized settlement on Zendikar; its fall to Ulamog's brood is the central disaster of the BFZ narrative arc. The speaker is identified as a kor world-gift, a kor spiritual designation.

A 2/3 flier for {3}{W} that triggers 2 life on entry; pauper-legal and commander-legal. EDHREC rank 22,777 reflects near-zero constructed presence — a Limited filler. The lifegain trigger was a standard rate for common white creatures in 2015 Limited design.
Art by Kieran Yanner, a frequent Magic illustrator whose work spans Zendikar through War of the Spark and a 2025 Artist Series Secret Lair (Lord of the Pit).
sources: Hipsters of the Coast, 'Experimental Storytelling in Secret Lair Artist Series,' November 2025
